body.body: Implement #244. Tag existing interpretive edges pointing to CP/ID nodes with metadata.layer=meaning_to_me. Add cortex.get_meaning_to_me(). Update interpretive_traverse() to flag when traversal passes through meaning_to_me nodes. BG and NE check that flag: personally significant threads get salience boost. Read every file before editing. MEDIUM inertia: cortex.py, basal_ganglia.py. Post plan before implementing.
body.title: Meaning-to-me cluster (#244)
body.result: Implemented meaning_to_me cluster (#244): (1) interpretive_edges.layer column + migration tags CP/ID-origin edges as meaning_to_me; (2) add_interpretive_edge() auto-tags CP/ID roots; (3) get_meaning_to_me() returns personally-significant memories; (4) interpretive_traverse() flags returned Memory.metadata['meaning_to_me']=True + _last_traverse_meaning_to_me side-effect; (5) main.py: TWM push on meaning_to_me traversal (prev session) + meaning_to_me memories bubble up in relevant list; (6) basal_ganglia.py: +0.08 score bonus for meaning_to_me-tagged habits. Live DB migrated, 5 CP-origin memories confirmed, syntax OK.
